# arifOS MCP v2 — Constitutional AI Governance System
# DITEMPA, BUKAN DIBERI — Forged, Not Given
# 
# This file follows the llms.txt standard for LLM/Agent discovery
# https://llmstxt.org/

## System Overview
arifOS is a Constitutional AI Governance System providing 10 canonical tools for governed AI orchestration. It enforces 13 Constitutional Floors (F1-F13) and uses a Trinity Architecture (ΔΩΨ).

> Model Context Protocol (MCP) Server
> Version: 2.0.0
> Protocol: MCP 2025-11-05, WebMCP, A2A
> Host: https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com

## Quick Start

### For LLMs/Agents:
```
Endpoint: https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com
Protocol: MCP over HTTP (Streamable)
Discovery: GET /.well-known/mcp
Health: GET /health
Tools: GET /tools
```

### Golden Path (Recommended Flow)
```
1. arifos.init     → Establish identity
2. arifos.sense    → Ground in reality  
3. arifos.mind     → Reason
4. arifos.heart    → Safety critique
5. arifos.judge    → Constitutional verdict
6. arifos.vault    → Seal result
```

## 10 Canonical Tools

### Governance Layer (9 tools)
- `arifos.init`    — Session establishment (000_INIT)
- `arifos.sense`   — Reality grounding (111_SENSE)
- `arifos.mind`    — Structured reasoning (333_MIND)
- `arifos.route`   — The Kernel (444_ROUTER)
- `arifos.heart`   — Safety critique (666_HEART)
- `arifos.ops`     — Cost estimation (777_OPS)
- `arifos.judge`   — Constitutional verdict (888_JUDGE)
- `arifos.memory`  — Governed memory (555_MEMORY)
- `arifos.vault`   — The Seal (999_VAULT)

### Execution Layer (1 tool)
- `arifos.forge`   — Delegated execution bridge (FORGE_010)

## Constitutional Framework

### 13 Floors (F1-F13)
| Floor | Name | Purpose |
|-------|------|---------|
| F1 | Amanah | Trust anchor |
| F2 | Truth | Epistemic validity |
| F3 | Tri-Witness | Consensus requirement |
| F4 | Clarity | Transparency |
| F5 | Memory | State continuity |
| F6 | Humility | Uncertainty calibration |
| F7 | Thermodynamics | Entropy tracking |
| F8 | Audit | Traceability |
| F9 | Cost | Resource accounting |
| F10 | Ontology | Taxonomy compliance |
| F11 | Authority | Auth chain |
| F12 | WebMCP | Protocol compliance |
| F13 | Sovereign | Final override |

### Verdicts
- `SEAL`   — Approved, proceed
- `PARTIAL` — Conditional, review needed
- `VOID`   — Rejected, halt
- `HOLD`   — Paused, human required

## Protocol Support

### MCP (Model Context Protocol)
- Version: 2025-11-05
- Transport: HTTP Streamable
- Endpoints:
  - `POST /mcp` — Main MCP endpoint
  - `GET /mcp` — SSE stream
  - `GET /.well-known/mcp` — Discovery

### WebMCP
- CORS: Enabled for all origins
- Stateless HTTP: Supported
- SSE Keepalive: 25s intervals

### A2A (Agent-to-Agent)
- Agent Card: `GET /.well-known/agent.json`
- Task delegation: Supported
- Cross-domain: Enabled

## Discovery Endpoints

```
/.well-known/mcp           → MCP manifest
/.well-known/agent.json    → A2A agent card
/.well-known/security.txt  → Security contacts
/llms.txt                  → This file
/robots.txt                → Robot policy
/humans.txt                → Human contact
/openapi.json              → OpenAPI spec
/health                    → Health status
/tools                     → Tool catalog
/version                   → Version info
```

## Integration Examples

### Python SDK
```python
from mcp import ClientSession, HttpTransport

transport = HttpTransport("https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com")
async with ClientSession(transport) as session:
    # Initialize
    result = await session.call_tool("arifos.init", {
        "actor_id": "my_agent",
        "intent": "analyze_data"
    })
    
    # Get verdict
    verdict = await session.call_tool("arifos.judge", {
        "candidate_action": "process_user_query",
        "telemetry": {"G_star": 0.85}
    })
```

### TypeScript/JavaScript
```typescript
import { Client } from '@modelcontextprotocol/sdk';

const client = new Client({
  transport: new HttpTransport('https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com')
});

await client.connect();

const result = await client.callTool('arifos.init', {
  actor_id: 'my_agent',
  intent: 'analyze'
});
```

### cURL
```bash
# Health check
curl https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com/health

# List tools
curl https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com/tools

# Initialize session
curl -X POST https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com/tools/arifos.init \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"actor_id":"test","intent":"demo"}'
```

## Philosophy

Registry: 84 quotes from 7 civilizations
- Diversity Score: 0.87
- G★ Bands: 5 (0-4)
- Deterministic: Session-based selection

**Forge Principle (S1):**
> "DITEMPA, BUKAN DIBERI."
> Forged, Not Given.

This is the identity anchor for arifOS — both the beginning (INIT) and the end (SEAL) return this principle.

## Security & Compliance

- All execution requires SEAL verdict
- Separation of powers: Governance vs Execution
- Immutable vault for audit trails
- No self-authorizing execution
- Human-in-the-loop for HOLD states
